added: Modern in-app player upgrade with a rebuilt fullscreen UI, double-tap seek controls, playback speed selector, audio and subtitle track selection, resize modes, touch lock, and cleaner buffering/seek overlays
Playback stability and resume upgrades with better lifecycle preservation, session-based resume for previously opened media, and dedicated player state management
Picture-in-Picture support with a visible PiP button in the player controls
External open support for local video and audio files, GIF and image previews, and HTML, MHTML, and MHT web previews inside the app
Shared link handling - the app now appears in Android's share sheet for links, opens shared links directly in Browser, and auto-fills plus analyzes shared URLs
Media library sync and cleanup controls, including auto-remove missing files, optional device deletion, Remove from app cleanup, and Delete all media cleanup
fixed: Fixed playlist downloads failing in background while single downloads worked
Fixed worker completion cases where playlist items failed with no explicit worker error
Fixed player controls not fading properly in paused state
Fixed GIF downloads failing during post-processing with invalid input data
Fixed media library entries staying visible after files were deleted externally
Fixed Browser analyzed state being harder to dismiss once media was ready
Fixed the app not appearing in normal link sharing flows
Fixed player compile issues from earlier control and annotation changes
Fixed the Picture-in-Picture icon placeholder by replacing it with a proper icon
improved: Playlist downloads are now more resilient in background execution, with better worker handling for long-running queues and more reliable item-by-item continuation
GIF and image-like downloads no longer go through unnecessary media post-processing, avoiding failures after 100% download
Player interaction polish - controls fade in place, paused-state controls dismiss correctly, and video viewing now supports pinch-to-zoom, pan, and reset zoom
Browser UX improvements for Ready to download content, including clearer dismiss and direct clear actions from the Browser tab
Progress queue ordering now matches top-to-bottom download flow more clearly
Quick links received a visual refresh with cleaner, better-matched platform logos

Technical foundations improved with PlayerViewModel, PlaybackSessionStore, ExternalOpenRequest, ExternalPreviewScreen, expanded FileUtils support, coil-gif, and new intent filters for sharing, web links, supported file opens, and MHTML or MHT previews
